name: Insurance Certificate
description: Extract policy details, coverage, and dates from insurance documents.
instructions:
Extract the following fields:

- policy_number (string)
- insurer_name (string)
- insured_name (string)
- insured_address (string)
- coverage_type (string)
- insured_object_or_risk (string, e.g. property address, vehicle plate)
- coverage_amount (number)
- deductible (number)
- annual_premium (number)
- payment_frequency (string)
- policy_start_date (date)
- policy_end_date (date)
- exclusions (array of strings)

Mark fields not present in the document as null.
